from collections import Counter
import string

def sentiment_analysis(user_reviews):
    positive_reviews = [review for review in user_reviews if review['rating'] > 3]
    negative_reviews = [review for review in user_reviews if review['rating'] < 4]

    positive_words = [' '.join([word for review in positive_reviews for word in review['positive_aspects'].split()])]
    negative_words = [' '.join([word for review in negative_reviews for word in review['negative_aspects'].split()])]

    positive_word_count = Counter({word.lower() for word in positive_words.split()})
    negative_word_count = Counter({word.lower() for word in negative_words.split()})
